country_result:
Country: Argentina
Coordinates: -49.35, -70.12
City: Santa Cruz Province
Continent: South America
final_reasoning: The image shows a remote, rural landscape characterized by a gravel road, vast open grasslands (pampas), and distant flat-topped mountains. The vegetation consists of low-lying shrubs and grasses, typical of the Patagonian steppe. There are no buildings, shops, pedestrians, or flags visible, indicating a very sparsely populated area. The presence of wire fencing suggests livestock farming (likely sheep). The overall geography, the specific look of the mountains in the background, and the road quality are highly characteristic of the Santa Cruz province in southern Argentina. Based on the visual cues of the Patagonian landscape and the road layout, this is located in the remote regions of southern South America.
